---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to the skill, the site, or the workflow
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
<!-- What gap or weakness does this address? -->

## Proposal
<!-- What should change? Be specific about which file/section. -->

## Does it keep the skill disruptive AND complete?
<!-- Every change must preserve both. Explain how. -->

## Evidence / back-test
<!-- If it touches SKILL.md, show a before/after run. -->

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Style red lines in CONTRIBUTING.md still hold
- [ ] Metrics do not regress
- [ ] CI stays green
